description: Domain architecture and catalytic residue conservation comparison between scully and HSD17B10
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(16, 12))

# ---- Panel 1: Domain architecture comparison ----
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_title("Domain Architecture: SCU (O18404) vs HSD17B10 (Q99714)", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# SCU
scu_len = 255
hsd_len = 261

# Draw protein bars
ax.barh(1.5, scu_len, height=0.6, color='lightblue', edgecolor='black', label='SCU (Drosophila)')
ax.barh(0.5, hsd_len, height=0.6, color='lightyellow', edgecolor='black', label='HSD17B10 (Human)')

# Rossmann motif
ax.barh(1.5, 8, left=9, height=0.6, color='green', alpha=0.7)
ax.barh(0.5, 8, left=15, height=0.6, color='green', alpha=0.7)

# SDR domain (PF00106) - approximate
ax.barh(1.5, 200, left=10, height=0.3, color='orange', alpha=0.5)
ax.barh(0.5, 200, left=16, height=0.3, color='orange', alpha=0.5)

# Active site marks
# SCU: S149, Y162, K166
for pos, label, color in [(149, 'S149', 'blue'), (162, 'Y162', 'red'), (166, 'K166', 'purple')]:
    ax.plot(pos, 1.5, 'v', color=color, markersize=12, zorder=5)
    ax.annotate(label, (pos, 1.85), ha='center', fontsize=8, color=color, fontweight='bold')

# HSD: S155, Y168, K172
for pos, label, color in [(155, 'S155', 'blue'), (168, 'Y168', 'red'), (172, 'K172', 'purple')]:
    ax.plot(pos, 0.5, 'v', color=color, markersize=12, zorder=5)
    ax.annotate(label, (pos, 0.85), ha='center', fontsize=8, color=color, fontweight='bold')

ax.set_xlim(0, 280)
ax.set_ylim(-0.2, 2.5)
ax.set_yticks([0.5, 1.5])
ax.set_yticklabels(['HSD17B10\n(Q99714, 261 aa)', 'SCU\n(O18404, 255 aa)'])
ax.set_xlabel('Residue position')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='green', alpha=0.7, label='Rossmann motif (TGGASGLG)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='orange', alpha=0.5, label='SDR domain (PF00106)'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='v', color='blue', label='Catalytic Ser', markersize=10, linestyle=''),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='v', color='red', label='Active site Tyr', markersize=10, linestyle=''),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='v', color='purple', label='Catalytic Lys', markersize=10, linestyle=''),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='upper right', fontsize=9)

# ---- Panel 2: Binding site conservation ----
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title("Binding Site Conservation (11/11 identical)", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

scu_binding = [14, 16, 35, 58, 59, 85, 149, 162, 166, 195, 197]
hsd_binding = [20, 22, 41, 64, 65, 91, 155, 168, 172, 201, 203]
residues = ['S', 'L', 'D', 'D', 'V', 'C', 'S', 'Y', 'K', 'F', 'T']
categories = ['NAD', 'NAD', 'NAD', 'NAD', 'NAD', 'NAD', 'Cat', 'Cat', 'Cat', 'Sub', 'Sub']

colors = {'NAD': '#2196F3', 'Cat': '#F44336', 'Sub': '#4CAF50'}
bar_colors = [colors[c] for c in categories]

x = np.arange(len(residues))
bars = ax2.bar(x, [1]*len(residues), color=bar_colors, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.8)

for i, (spos, hpos, res) in enumerate(zip(scu_binding, hsd_binding, residues)):
    ax2.text(i, 0.5, f"{res}", ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='white')
    ax2.text(i, 1.08, f"SCU:{spos}\nHSD:{hpos}", ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=7)

ax2.set_xticks(x)
ax2.set_xticklabels([f"{r}{s}" for r, s in zip(residues, scu_binding)], fontsize=9)
ax2.set_ylabel("Conservation")
ax2.set_ylim(0, 1.5)
ax2.set_yticks([0, 0.5, 1.0])
ax2.set_yticklabels(['0%', '50%', '100%'])

legend2 = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#2196F3', label='NAD-binding'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#F44336', label='Catalytic triad'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#4CAF50', label='Substrate-binding'),
]
ax2.legend(handles=legend2, loc='upper right')

# ---- Panel 3: Key motif alignments ----
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_title("Key Conserved Motifs", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax3.axis('off')

motifs = [
    ("Rossmann (NAD-binding)", "SCU 10: TGGASGLG\nHSD 16: TGGASGLG", "100% identical"),
    ("Cofactor-binding", "SCU 84: NCAG\nHSD 90: NCAG", "100% identical"),
    ("Active site (YxxxK)", "SCU 162: YSASK\nHSD 168: YSASK", "100% identical"),
    ("SDR catalytic triad", "SCU: S149-Y162-K166\nHSD: S155-Y168-K172", "All 3 conserved"),
]

for i, (name, alignment, conservation) in enumerate(motifs):
    y = 0.85 - i * 0.22
    ax3.text(0.05, y, name, fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', va='top',
             transform=ax3.transAxes)
    ax3.text(0.35, y, alignment, fontsize=10, family='monospace', va='top',
             transform=ax3.transAxes)
    ax3.text(0.75, y, conservation, fontsize=11, va='top', color='green', fontweight='bold',
             transform=ax3.transAxes)

# Summary box
summary_text = (
    "Sequence identity: 73.1% | Similarity: 83.1%\n"
    "Binding sites: 11/11 conserved (100%)\n"
    "Both: SDR family (PF00106) | EC 1.1.1.35 | Mitochondrial matrix | RNase P component"
)
props = dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightgreen', alpha=0.3)
ax3.text(0.5, 0.05, summary_text, fontsize=11, ha='center', va='bottom',
         transform=ax3.transAxes, bbox=props)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("scu_hsd17b10_comparison.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved.")
